DA'S OPPOSITION TO DEFT'S PC1538,5 MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE FILED
DEFT'S PC1538,5 MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE FILED
/CAL  SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT/X  SFSD AFFIDAVIT WARRANT IS ADMINISTRAIVELY DISCHARGED,/VD: 05-13-19, HEARING/MO138573/X: THE PEOPLE ARE TO PROCEED BY WAY OF FEDERAL INDICTMENT,/

/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LDPX:10-11-18/987,2/OR/DEF:IS ORDERED RELEASED ON PRE-TRIAL ELECTRONIC MONITORING BYTHE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE ON HOME DETENTION AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ONTHE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X: DEFENDANT MAY LEAVE HOME FOR THE PURPOSE OF TRANSPORTING HIS CHILD TO AND FROM SCHOOL,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/WS/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
